name: spinner-input-group
visual_summary: The Spinner Input Group is a visually appealing input field that includes an animated spinning icon, used when the user is waiting for a response from the server, such as while loading data into a text field to make the UI more interactive and engaging. It is commonly used to enhance the user experience of long loading times or slow server responses. A Spinner Input Group is typically applied to forms or text fields that require user input before submitting a request.
generation_prompt:

Description: The Spinner Input Group is a visually appealing input field that includes an animated spinning icon, used when the user is waiting for a response from the server, such as while loading data into a text field to make the UI more interactive and engaging. A Spinner Input Group is typically applied to forms or text fields that require user input before submitting a request.
Style: e.g. minimal, light
Interactions: e.g. hover, click, animate on load
Tags: interactive, animated, input, loader, slow server response, long loading time, forms, text fields
